violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Ice bin on front counter needs to be covered when not in use.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent over panini presses used to cook proteins.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
